entities.name: MGNREGA
entities.description: The Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, the world's largest employment guarantee programme launched by the Indian government to cover rural areas.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where MGNREGA was launched and implemented.

entities.name: RURAL TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The dynamics of change in rural areas influenced by employment guarantee programmes.

entities.name: WELFARE IMPLICATIONS
entities.description: The effects of MGNREGA on the well-being and welfare of the rural population.

entities.name: MICRO-LEVEL ANALYSES
entities.description: Detailed analyses conducted at a small scale to assess the heterogeneous impacts of MGNREGA.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TOOLS
entities.description: Numerical and statistical methods used for analyzing the programme's outcomes.

entities.name: QUALITATIVE TOOLS
entities.description: Non-numerical methods used for analyzing the programme's outcomes.

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Region where similar employment schemes are discussed in the context of lessons learnt from India.

entities.name: SOUTH-EAST ASIA
entities.description: Region where similar employment schemes are discussed in the context of lessons learnt from India.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region where similar employment schemes are discussed in the context of lessons learnt from India.

entities.name: LATIN AMERICA
entities.description: Region where similar employment schemes are discussed in the context of lessons learnt from India.

entities.name: RURAL DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Various welfare and development initiatives that converge with MGNREGA at national and state levels.
